pages.text: Industrial craft class. After picking Engineer, a second screen offers one of three disciplines: $(l:classes/eng_aeronautical)Aero$(/l), $(l:classes/eng_mechanical)Mech$(/l), or $(l:classes/eng_electrical)Elec$(/l).$(br2)Trains, andesite alloy, casings, precision mechanisms, and train tracks stay open to all players. Engineer is about the machines built on top of that supply chain. Mech is the hub — Aero and Elec top-tier items require a Mech-made part.
